ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder, defender) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "foot_preference" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (e.g., right, left) */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* Player's shirt number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Player's market value in millions of the local currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Team's social media handle */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the performance is recorded */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "xg_aerial" REAL /* Expected goals from aerial situations */,
  "xg_cross" REAL /* Expected goals from crosses */,
  "xg_none" REAL /* Expected goals from other situations */,
  "xg_pass" REAL /* Expected goals from passes */,
  "xg_dribble" REAL /* Expected goals from dribbles */,
  "xg_looseball" REAL /* Expected goals from loose balls */,
  "xg_chipped" REAL /* Expected goals from chipped shots */,
  "xg_throughball" REAL /* Expected goals from throughballs */,
  "xg_layoff" REAL /* Expected goals from layoffs */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who took the shot */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the shot was taken */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., foot, head, other) */,
  "shot_result" TEXT /* Result of the shot (e.g., goal, save, miss) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the shot was taken */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the shot location on the field */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the shot location on the field */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Body part used for the shot (e.g., right foot, left foot, head) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the shot from the goal in meters */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the shot from the goal line in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assists" (
  "assist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assist */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the assist */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the assist was made */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "assist_type" TEXT /* Type of assist (e.g., pass, cross, throughball) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the assist was made */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the assist location on the field */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the assist location on the field */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the assist from the goal in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assists_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assists_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "game_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "xg" REAL /* Expected goals in the game */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
